case_title: TANISHA R HAMILTON VS. DAISY BRAXTON

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,000.00 FILED BY HAMILTON, TANISHA R AS TO DEFENDANT BRAXTON, DAISY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-27-2009 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$79.50) SERVED APR-20-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BRAXTON, DAISY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-27-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-27-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
STIPULATION FOR HEARIMG BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD FILED BY HAMILTON, TANISHA R BRAXTON, DAISY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-27-2009 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, ROOM 103)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAMILTON, TANISHA R RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRAXTON, DAISY $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,075.00, *THE COURT FINDS DEFENDANT FAILED TO PROVIDE PLAINTIFF WITH A TIMELY INSPECTION; HOWEVER THE COURT ALSO FINDS THERE WAS JUSTIFICATION FOR DEFENDANT'S WITHHOLDING OF PART OF THE DEPOSIT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
